name: xfpl-mcp
description: Fantasy Premier League live data, EO, price changes, captain ranker, and chip planner — exposed as MCP tools.

fantasy_premier_league_session_cookie.title: FPL session cookie (optional)
fantasy_premier_league_session_cookie.description: Optional. Paste the value of your 'pl_profile' cookie from fantasy.premierleague.com to unlock /me and /my-team endpoints. Most xfpl tools work without this — anonymous reads cover rank, prices, EO, fixtures, captain ranker, etc.
